message: Jake
Kristy
Oh, welcome.
Hey, how have you been?
You say you're doing well? Hehe.
Hehe.
That's annoying.
I wonder what that means?
Oh, again.
It is.
It's boring.
Look.
Talk.
Listen.
Think.
Move.
System
Surroundings
Guy
Günter
Counseling
Guy
About　him.
Günter
Counseling
To another place.
Save
Exit the game.
The room is covered in a thin layer of dust, as if it hasn't been cleaned in a while.
Could the stale air be because the windows are closed?
I feel like I'll get sick if I stay in a place like this.
Kristy appears to have no visible change. Yet, there's something off about her.
Could it be that my heart is broken again?
The conversation feels a bit off.
What on earth happened?
What's wrong with you,
coming to visit at this hour?
This hour? It's still daytime, though.
If Gai saw me talking to you,
Brrr, that's scary.
Did you hear from Gai?
You say you got a message from him?
What exactly is he talking about?
You've been coming over a lot lately. Are you trying to interrupt my happy time with Gai?
I can't even understand what you're saying.
What's wrong with you? Did you eat something bad?
Today's
feels a bit strange.
Gai is doing well.
You seem to be doing well too.
So Gai came back from his trip.
Gai went on a trip? Really?
What on earth has gotten into you?
Oh, Gai.
Hehe, I was just talking to him.
Come on, don't look at me like that.
? Gai isn't here, you know.
Oh, come on,
you're being such a tease. Gai.
So, you're going back to your room? Alright, see you later.
I can't see Gai at all.
So, stop teasing me.
Gai isn't on a trip. Besides, it’s just crazy that you can't see him.
What's wrong with you?
Who was Günter again?
It's the psychiatrist you’re getting counseling from.
I’m not seeing any psychiatrist, you know. How rude!
Right, Günter and I aren’t getting married. I mean, I have Gai.
I’m happy, you know.
Isn’t what you’re saying a bit strange?
Please, don’t say silly things. Or are you jealous of me and Gai?
Hey, let’s hang out together with Gai next time.
Hey, could you leave already? I want to spend some time with Gai.
What’s going on? Something feels off today.
The one who’s off is you.
I think you should be the one to get counseling instead of talking to me.
What on earth happened to you?
How’s counseling?
I’m not going to counseling.
You’re acting pretty weird, you know.
You’re the weird one. What’s going on with you?
I can’t believe this. What’s your deal?
If you keep insulting me, I’m going to get mad.
What are you talking about, saying that Gai is here? He’s nowhere to be seen.
Or is Gai secretly back?
No, if he were here, he would show up.
Where could Gai possibly be at a time like this?
This is strange. Are you trying to mess with me?
What on earth is this all about?
What in the world happened?
Acting like Gai, who shouldn’t be here, is around, and saying everything before didn’t happen.
Right now,
it’s completely crazy.
How did it come to this?
Right now,
Only Günter can explain the situation.
I should have been regularly visiting Günter, but,
what happened to him?
Does Günter know about the current
situation?
Could it be that going to counseling has caused a breakdown in his mental state?
He should have been receiving counseling, but something seems off.
Counseling can't be having a reverse effect, can it?
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
